prerequisites: A Sigma Computing organization with access to the Sigma REST API.
A Sigma admin user, since API client credentials must be associated with an admin user in the same Sigma organization.

Your Sigma API request URL (the base_url), which depends on the cloud platform and region where your Sigma environment is hosted (for example https://api.sigmacomputing.com for a GCP-US organization). Find the correct value in Sigma's Supported cloud platforms and regions table.
Generated API client credentials (a client ID and client secret) for the user whose data you want to access.

authMethods.name: OAuth client credentials (client ID and secret)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the Sigma-issued client_id and client_secret. These are exchanged at the POST /v2/auth/token endpoint using grant_type=client_credentials to obtain an oauth_access_token that is valid for one hour.

authMethods.name: Refresh token
authMethods.summary: The token endpoint also supports the refresh_token grant. Supply client_refresh_token to obtain a new access token before the current one expires, so extraction can continue without regenerating credentials.

setupSteps.title: Identify your API base URL
setupSteps.body: Determine the API request URL for the cloud platform and region hosting your Sigma organization, and use it as the base_url config value. Sigma lists the correct base URL per deployment in its Supported cloud platforms and regions documentation; for example, a GCP-US organization uses https://api.sigmacomputing.com.

setupSteps.title: Generate API client credentials in Sigma
setupSteps.body: As a Sigma admin, create API client credentials for the target user. Sigma returns a clientId and clientSecret, which the response flags as sensitive; store them securely. These map to the client_id and client_secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Obtain access and refresh tokens
setupSteps.body: Send a POST request to {base_url}/v2/auth/token with grant_type=client_credentials and your client ID and secret to obtain an access token (oauth_access_token), valid for one hour. Use the returned refresh token (client_refresh_token) with the refresh_token grant to renew the access token before it expires.

setupSteps.title: Provide the credentials to pm
setupSteps.body: Set base_url, client_id, client_secret, and client_refresh_token in the connector config. The optional oauth_access_token and oauth_token_expiry_date fields hold the current short-lived token and its expiry; leave them unset to have a token fetched on first use.
